response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio in the video is a medley of songs (including 'SPARKS', 'Fever Rhythm', and 'DO U'), while the provided Reference JSON describes a full performance of 'Heart Challenger'. The audio does not match the reference. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was discarded due to the song mismatch. Manual transcription was performed for all vocals and prominent on-screen text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal bursts. Rapid transitions in the medley are handled with tight truncation to prevent cascading delays. Visual text at the end is subtitled for its full on-screen duration.
